title: Quran, Sura 112: Al-Ikhlas
description: Sura 112 (Al-Ikhlas: Sincerity) from the Holy Quran.
introduction: Sura 112, Al-Ikhlas ('Sincerity'), is the most concise statement of Islamic monotheism — only four short verses. The Prophet Muhammad said it is equivalent to one-third of the entire Quran. It defines God as One, eternal, neither begetting nor begotten, without equal — a direct rejection of Trinitarian and polytheistic theologies.

translation.text: Say: He is Allah, the One.
He neither begets, nor is born.
Nor is there to Him any equivalent.
